ast.target: 删除账户及所有数据。此操作不可逆。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use the "heart" icon on the action bar (bottom right).
ast.target: 使用操作栏（右下角）的“心形”图标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use the "#" icon on the action bar (bottom right).
ast.target: 使用操作栏（右下角）的“#”图标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Right-click an image on the page and save it to Memex.
ast.target: 右键点击页面上的图片并将其保存到 Memex。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open the Memex Wikipedia page and create your first highlight or note.
ast.target: 打开 Memex 的维基百科页面，创建你的第一个高亮或笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hover over the action bar in the bottom right and click "ask".
ast.target: 将鼠标悬停在右下角的操作栏上，然后点击“提问”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Highlight a piece of text and select "ask AI".
ast.target: 高亮一段文本，然后选择“询问 AI”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use the "heart" button on the action bar below the video
ast.target: 使用视频下方操作栏上的“心形”按钮

ast.name: description
ast.source: Click on "add note" in the action bar under the video to create a note at the current timestamp
ast.target: 点击视频下方操作栏中的“添加笔记”，在当前时间戳创建笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select a span in the video timeline under the action bar and click on "add note" to save a range note.
ast.target: 在视频下方操作栏的时间线上选择一个片段，然后点击“添加笔记”以保存范围笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Capture a video frame and save it as a snapshot note.
ast.target: 捕获视频帧并将其保存为快照笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Click summarize on the action bar below the video. You can also select a time range first.
ast.target: 点击视频下方操作栏上的“总结”。你也可以先选择一个时间范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: You can save a tweet with the "heart" icon in the Memex action bar (bottom right)
ast.target: 你可以使用 Memex 操作栏（右下角）的“心形”图标保存推文

ast.name: description
ast.source: Memex tracks X posts you bookmark.
ast.target: Memex 会追踪你收藏的 X 帖子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use the "memexLogo" button next to the upvotes or the regular save action on the action bar.
ast.target: 使用点赞按钮旁边的“memexLogo”按钮，或操作栏上的常规保存操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Right click on the video and press 'Save to Memex'
ast.target: 右键点击视频并按“保存到 Memex”

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use the "search" icon on the action bar (bottom right).
ast.target: 使用操作栏（右下角）的“搜索”图标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render math in display mode, which puts the math in display style (so \int and \sum are large, for example), and centers the math on the page on its own line.
ast.target: 以显示模式渲染数学公式，这会将数学公式置于显示样式（例如，\\int 和 \\sum 会变大），并将数学公式居中显示在页面的独立行上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the markup language of the output.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render display math in leqno style (left-justified tags).
ast.target: 以 leqno 样式（左对齐标签）渲染显示数学公式。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 将显示数学公式左对齐渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a minimum thickness, in ems, for fraction lines, `\sqrt` top lines, `{array}` vertical lines, `\hline`, `\hdashline`, `\underline`, `\overline`, and the borders of `\fbox`, `\boxed`, and `\fcolorbox`.
ast.target: 指定分数线、`\\sqrt` 顶线、`{array}` 垂直线、`\\hline`、`\\hdashline`、`\\underline`、`\\overline` 以及 `\\fbox`、`\\boxed` 和 `\\fcolorbox` 边框的最小厚度（以 em 为单位）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes \color behave like LaTeX's 2-argument \textcolor, instead of LaTeX's one-argument \color mode change.
ast.target: 使 \\color 的行为类似于 LaTeX 的双参数 \\textcolor，而不是 LaTeX 的单参数 \\color 模式更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turn on strict / LaTeX faithfulness mode, which throws an error if the input uses features that are not supported by LaTeX.
ast.target: 开启严格 / LaTeX 忠实模式，如果输入使用了 LaTeX 不支持的功能，将抛出错误。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trust the input, enabling all HTML features such as \url.
ast.target: 信任输入，启用所有 HTML 功能，例如 \\url。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If non-zero, all user-specified sizes, e.g. in \rule{500em}{500em}, will be capped to maxSize ems. Otherwise, elements and spaces can be arbitrarily large
ast.target: 如果非零，所有用户指定的尺寸，例如在 \\rule{500em}{500em} 中，将被限制为最大 maxSize em。否则，元素和空间可以任意大。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit the number of macro expansions to the specified number, to prevent e.g. infinite macro loops. If set to Infinity, the macro expander will try to fully expand as in LaTeX.
ast.target: 将宏展开次数限制为指定次数，以防止例如无限宏循环。如果设置为 Infinity，宏展开器将尝试像 LaTeX 一样完全展开。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Restore purchase is only available in the iOS mobile app
ast.target: 恢复购买仅在 iOS 移动应用中可用

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cloudflare Workers detected. WebSocket clients are not supported in Cloudflare Workers.
ast.target: 检测到 Cloudflare Workers。Cloudflare Workers 不支持 WebSocket 客户端。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Edge runtime detected (Vercel Edge/Netlify Edge). WebSockets are not supported in edge functions.
ast.target: 检测到 Edge 运行时（Vercel Edge/Netlify Edge）。边缘函数不支持 WebSocket。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unknown JavaScript runtime without WebSocket support.
ast.target: 未知的 JavaScript 运行时，不支持 WebSocket。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Failed to move drawing. Please try again.

ast.name: message
ast.source: Extension context invalidated. Please reload the page.
ast.target: 扩展上下文已失效。请重新加载页面。

ast.name: message
ast.source: There was an issue saving your note. We saved it to local storage so you can retry
ast.target: 保存笔记时出现问题。我们已将其保存到本地存储，您可以重试。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Handles with 1-3 characters are not available yet.

ast.name: message
ast.source: <5 character handles only with lifetime plan
ast.target: 仅限终身计划使用少于5个字符的用户名

ast.name: message
ast.source: Handles may contain letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores, periods, and tildes.
ast.target: 用户名可包含字母、数字、连字符、下划线、句点和波浪号。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 无法验证用户名可用性。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Registration ceremony was sent an abort signal
ast.target: 注册仪式收到了中止信号

ast.name: message
ast.source: Discoverable credentials were required but no available authenticator supported it
ast.target: 需要可发现的凭据，但没有可用的认证器支持它

ast.name: message
ast.source: User verification was required during automatic registration but it could not be performed
ast.target: 自动注册期间需要用户验证，但无法执行

ast.name: message
ast.source: User verification was required but no available authenticator supported it
ast.target: 需要用户验证，但没有可用的认证器支持它

ast.name: message
ast.source: No entry in pubKeyCredParams was of type "public-key"

ast.name: message
ast.source: No available authenticator supported any of the specified pubKeyCredParams algorithms
ast.target: 没有可用的认证器支持指定的pubKeyCredParams算法中的任何一种

ast.name: message
ast.source: User ID was not between 1 and 64 characters
ast.target: 用户ID不在1到64个字符之间

ast.name: message
ast.source: The authenticator was unable to process the specified options, or could not create a new credential
ast.target: 认证器无法处理指定的选项，或无法创建新凭据

ast.name: message
ast.source: a Non-Webauthn related error has occurred

ast.name: message
ast.source: Authentication ceremony was sent an abort signal
ast.target: 认证仪式收到了中止信号

ast.name: message
ast.source: The authenticator was unable to process the specified options, or could not create a new assertion signature
ast.target: 认证器无法处理指定的选项，或无法创建新的断言签名

ast.name: message
ast.source: JSON object requested, multiple (or no) rows returned
ast.target: 请求JSON对象，但返回了多行（或无）数据

ast.name: message
ast.source: Edge Function returned a non-2xx status code
ast.target: 边缘函数返回了非2xx状态码

ast.name: message
ast.source: Could not find the X post for this video.
ast.target: 找不到此视频对应的X帖子。

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 逗号分隔的单词或短语

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Describe when this rule should match
ast.target: 描述此规则何时应匹配

ast.name: subtitle
ast.source: Match exact words or phrases in the content, comma separated.
ast.target: 匹配内容中的确切单词或短语，用逗号分隔。

ast.name: subtitle
ast.target: 按格式匹配已保存的内容。

ast.name: subtitle
ast.source: Explain topics, themes and preferences and let AI do the matching for you.
ast.target: 解释主题、主题和偏好，让AI为您完成匹配。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Save an image from the web

ast.name: title
ast.source: Capture, search and summarize content on the fly
ast.target: 即时捕获、搜索和总结内容

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Ask questions about anything with this tag
ast.target: 就任何带有此标签的内容提问

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Save the current filters and tag selections into a view
ast.target: 将当前筛选器和标签选择保存为视图

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Searches by meaning, not just keywords. Best for broad, multilingual, or fuzzy queries when you’re not sure about how exactly things were written.
ast.target: 按语义而非仅关键词搜索。最适合当您不确定具体内容如何书写时，进行宽泛、多语言或模糊查询。
